title: Count per Group
description: Welcome to Rank Challenge. Leadership wants to know how many orders each customer has placed. Return the `user_id` and the number of orders per user from the `orders` table, using COUNT and GROUP BY.
objectives: Collapse them per user with GROUP BY
hints: COUNT(*) counts the rows in each group.
GROUP BY user_id makes one row per user.

files.content:
-- TODO: produce one row per customer with how many orders they have placed
SELECT user_id FROM orders;

parseRules.failMessage: Collapse rows per user with GROUP BY.
